finding.summary: The Parallel Drum Bus track has no FX chain and no receives, despite its intended role as a parallel compression bus. This suggests it is an unprocessed duplicate of the dry drum signal, which will cause level doubling and potential phase issues when summed with the original.
finding.probable_cause: The track was created as a parallel bus but the compressor and routing were never configured, or the FX were accidentally removed.
finding.confidence_reason: We have no visibility of other tracks or the overall mix, but the track name, empty FX chain, and absence of receives strongly indicate misconfiguration.

evidence_refs.description: The track is named 'Parallel Drum Bus'.
Empty FX chain, indicating no processing.
No receives, so this track is not receiving audio from a dry drum bus.

proposal.reason: Muting this track will prevent the unprocessed parallel signal from summing with the dry drums, avoiding potential level increase and phase issues. This is a preview; no data is removed.
